message:
fix: display resumed conversation history in TUI

On resume, read raw session events from the JSONL log and pass them
to App as initialEvents. ConversationView renders them on mount using
a lazy useState initializer, so historical events appear before any
new events. The cli.ts resume flow reads and parses the log file,
and passes the events through App to ConversationView.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
